                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="255"/>

            <s:extends type="rs:rowbase"/>
        </s:ElementType>
    </s:Schema>
    <rs:data>

taskRecordSets.name: 检测结果数据_全部
taskRecordSets.xml:
<xml xmlns:dt="uuid:C2F41010-65B3-11d1-A29F-00AA00C14882" xmlns:rs="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:rowset" xmlns:s="uuid:BDC6E3F0-6DA3-11d1-A2A3-00AA00C14882" xmlns:z="#RowsetSchema">
    <s:Schema id="RowsetSchema">
        <s:ElementType rs:CommandTimeout="30" content="eltOnly" name="row" rs:updatable="true">
            <s:AttributeType name="c0" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="1" rs:name="试件ID" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="50"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c1" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="2" rs:name="检验任务单ID" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="50"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c2" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="3" rs:name="指标名称" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="1000"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c3" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="4" rs:name="参数名称" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="1000"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c4" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="5" rs:name="检验组数" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="1000"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c5" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="6" rs:name="检验次数" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="int" dt:maxLength="4"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c6" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="7" rs:name="检验值" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="1000"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c7" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="8" rs:name="序号" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="11"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:AttributeType name="c8" rs:nullable="true" rs:number="9" rs:name="值ID" rs:writeunknown="true">
                <s:datatype rs:dbtype="string" dt:maxLength="50"/>
            </s:AttributeType>
            <s:extends type="rs:rowbase"/>
        </s:ElementType>
    </s:Schema>
    <rs:data/>
</xml>

taskRecordSets.name: 检验参数值

<xml xmlns:s='uuid:BDC6E3F0-6DA3-11d1-A2A3-00AA00C14882'
	xmlns:dt='uuid:C2F41010-65B3-11d1-A29F-00AA00C14882'
	xmlns:rs='urn:schemas-microsoft-com:rowset'
	xmlns:z='#RowsetSchema'>
<s:Schema id='RowsetSchema'>
	<s:ElementType name='row' content='eltOnly' rs:updatable='true'>
		<s:AttributeType name='检验任务单ID' rs:number='1' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='string' dt:maxLength='50' rs:precision='10'
			 rs:fixedlength='true' rs:maybenull='false'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='试件ID' rs:number='2' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='string' dt:maxLength='50' rs:precision='10'
			 rs:fixedlength='true' rs:maybenull='false'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='检验组数' rs:number='3' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='int' dt:maxLength='4' rs:precision='10'
			 rs:fixedlength='true' rs:maybenull='false'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='检验次数' rs:number='4' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='int' dt:maxLength='4' rs:precision='10'
			 rs:fixedlength='true' rs:maybenull='false'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='组数次数ID' rs:number='5' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='int' dt:maxLength='4' rs:precision='10'
			 rs:fixedlength='true' rs:maybenull='false'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='c5' rs:name='抗压强度↘备注' rs:number='6'
			 rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='string' rs:dbtype='str' dt:maxLength='200'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='c6' rs:name='抗压强度↘基准配比_28天换算成标准试件抗压强度值'
			 rs:number='7' rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>

		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='c7' rs:name='抗压强度↘基准配比_28天换算值系数'
			 rs:number='8' rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>
			<s:datatype dt:type='string' rs:dbtype='str' dt:maxLength='200'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='c8' rs:name='抗压强度↘基准配比_28天极限荷载'
			 rs:number='9' rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>

			 rs:number='10' rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>

			<s:datatype dt:type='string' rs:dbtype='str' dt:maxLength='200'/>
		</s:AttributeType>
		<s:AttributeType name='c11' rs:name='抗压强度↘基准配比_28天试验日期'
			 rs:number='12' rs:nullable='true' rs:writeunknown='true'>
